title: Splash Water
description: Splash water potions and water bottles are now useful!
body:
Splash Water makes splash water potions and water bottles useful.

 

## **FEATURES**💥

- Splash water potions can now be throwed to players, animals, and mobs to extinguish fire.
- Water bottles can now be drinked to extinguish yourslef from fire.


## **ISSUES** ⛔

If you find any issue with the mod, create a new issue on the mod github [page](https://github.com/Mr-Awsaf/SplashWater/issues).
